verse_text: Where is the wise? Where is the scribe? Where is the disputer of this age? Has not God made foolish the wisdom of this world?

pericope.title: The Message of Unity: Exaltation of the Cross

links.context: One cannot know God through worldly wisdom, which God considers foolishness (see also [[1CO.1:20]], [[1CO.1:21]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
